zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Wilmot於1613年10月出生在英國倫敦時，他的父親Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone41歲，母親Sarah Anderson19歲。他於1633年8月21日與Francis Moreton在英國英格蘭倫敦切爾西結婚。他去世於1658年2月19日在荷蘭藍德斯盧易斯享年44歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾斯培爾斯波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Wilmot于1613年10月出生在英国倫敦时，他的父亲Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone41岁，母亲Sarah Anderson19岁。他于1633年8月21日与Francis Moreton在英国英格兰倫敦切爾西结婚。他去世于1658年2月19日在荷兰藍德斯盧易斯享年44岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾斯培爾斯波利。

nameMeanings.name: Wilmot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will(i)mot(t), a hypocoristic form of Willelm (see William ). Compare the Old French personal name Guillemot. This surname has been established in Ireland (Kerry) since 1614.
Walloon: from a pet form of the personal name   William  . Compare   Wilmont  .
History: Benjamin Wilmot and his wife, with their 6-year-old son William, emigrated from England to New Haven, CT, in or before 1640.

variants.name: Wilmont
meanings: Altered form of Walloon or English Wilmot . The surname Wilmont is also found in Belgium (Wallonia) and northern France, but it is very rare there.
In some cases probably also Dutch: altered form of Walloon Wilmot or of its very rare French cognate Willemont.

variants.name: Wilmarth
meanings: History: Thomas Wilmarth (1620–90) came to North America in 1639. He was one ofthe proprietors of Rehoboth, MA, in 1643.

variants.name: William
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name William, Willam, Willem, an Old Picard and Norman French form of ancient Germanic Willihelm, composed of the elements wil- ‘will, desire’ + helm- ‘helmet, protection’. This Norman personal name became widely used in England, Scotland and Wales after the Conquest, mainly no doubt in honor of the Conqueror himself. By the 13th century it had already become the most popular personal name in England. A Parisian form of the name Guillaume was also sometimes used (see Gillam ), which in medieval Wales was adopted as Gwilym (see Gwilliam ).
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Guillaume  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Wilmot was born in October 1613, in London, England, his father, Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone, was 41 and his mother, Sarah Anderson, was 19. He married Francis Moreton on 21 August 1633, in Chelsea, London, England, United Kingdom. He died on 19 February 1658, in Sluis, Zeeland, Netherlands, at the age of 44, and was buried in Spelsbury, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.Saint Martin in the Fields, Westminster,: St Martin in the Fields, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Wilmot est né en octobre 1613, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Sarah Anderson, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Francis Moreton le 21 août 1633, à Chelsea, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 19 février 1658, à Sluis, Zélande, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Spelsbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

August 1633 in Chelsea, London, England, United Kingdom Francis Moreton geheiratet. Er starb am 19. it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Wilmot è nato il nel ottobre 1613 nel London, England, il suo padre, Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Sarah Anderson, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Francis Moreton il 21 agosto 1633, nel Chelsea, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 19 febbraio 1658, nel Sluis, Zelanda, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Spelsbury, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Wilmotが1613年10月にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athloneは41歳，母Sarah Andersonは19歳であった。1633年8月21日にイギリスイギリスロンドンチェルセアでFrancis Moretonと結婚した。彼は1658年2月19日にオランダゼエランドスルイスで44歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスペルスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Wilmot(이)가 1613년 10월 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Sarah Anderson(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1633년 8월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 첼시에서 Francis Moreton(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1658년 2월 19일 네덜란드 제랜드 스루이스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 스플스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Wilmot nasceu em outubro de 1613, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Anderson, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Francis Moreton em 21 de agosto de 1633, em Chelsea, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 19 de fevereiro de 1658, em Sluis, Zelandia, Países Baixos, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Spelsbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Saint Martin in the Fields, Westminster,: ст мартинь ин т фиелдс, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Wilmot родился октябрь 1613 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, его отцу по имени Viscount Charles Wilmot of Athlone было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Sarah Anderson, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Francis Moreton 21 августа 1633 г. в местности челсеа, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 19 февраля 1658 г. в местности слуиз, зиланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности спелсбури, оксфордшир, Англия.
